_meta.title: CSS-less-consumer contract family — the gallery-defect design rulings (tickets #29 #30 #31 #32 #33, glance #27)
_meta.renumber_note: pre-handoff repair 2026-07-08: the family shifted +1 (law=0102, spacing=0103, tabs=0104, calendar=0105, text=0106) after 0101 was taken concurrently by the overlay-toggle ruling (ticket #28); no structural change
_meta.author: system-planner
_meta.context: ADR-0096 ratified the forcing argument (an A2UI/Gen-UI consumer composes from catalog props only and has NO CSS-authoring verb). Five gallery defects share that root tension: component contracts that delegate layout/spacing/surface/overflow to 'the page author' deterministically fail on A2UI surfaces. This manifest plans the ruling family: one principle ADR + four mechanism ADRs, plus the #27 disposition.
_meta.outside_in_derivation: context (the family ruling) -> outcomes (the principle answered once; each defect cluster ruled) -> tasks (one ADR per independent mechanism + log bookkeeping). Structure follows REVERSIBILITY seams: reverting the calendar geometry must not touch the tabs surface, so they are separate records; the radio-group and form-provider legs share ONE fork (who owns spacing) and one decision rule, so they are one record.
_meta.inside_out_derivation: needs enumerated from the five tickets + the ADR-0093/0048/0015/0030/0057 invariants each fix must preserve, independent of the record structure.

nodes.label: CSS-less-consumer contract family ruling (the whole intake)
ADR-0102 — the fleet principle: catalog-reachable correctness law + the safe-default/taught-idiom/catalog-prop decision rule
nodes.accept: adr_check.py 0102-*.md exits 0; the decision rule names the three lanes and when each applies; README index row present; Status: proposed

nodes.label: ADR-0103 — the spacing pair ruling (#31 radio-group + #33 form-provider, ruled together as the two poles of one fork)
radio-group leg: component-owned layout (flex axis from [orientation] + gap token), wrap-idiom structurally impossible (direct-children discovery radio-group.ts:194)
nodes.accept: adr_check.py 0103-*.md exits 0; the clause cites radio-group.ts:194 as the wrap-impossibility proof; blast radius names the two site inline-style overrides + radio-group.md:94 repair + test re-keys

nodes.label: form-provider leg: contract stands (pure coordination), spacing = the taught Column-gap wrap (68d2a8d evidence), residual model-uptake risk accepted with severity argument
nodes.accept: adr_check.py 0103-*.md exits 0; the clause cites the committed seed fix + the corpus/exemplar teaching lane (ADR-0091) and names the accepted residual risk in Consequences

nodes.label: ADR-0104 — tabs surface ruling (#29): bare ui-tabs drops its own neutral-surface plane (tabs.css:20), transparent-by-default per ADR-0015 cl.1
nodes.accept: adr_check.py 0104-*.md exits 0; names who relied on the plane (tabs-css.test.ts:45, tabs-doc/demo canvas-surface look) and the per-consumer repair (explicit elevation attr); rejects composition-aware CSS with a stated reason

nodes.label: ADR-0105 — calendar grid geometry ruling (#30): fluid tracks minmax(cell,1fr) + two-layer cell anatomy (full-track band layer, fixed circular point layer)
nodes.accept: adr_check.py 0105-*.md exits 0; every ADR-0093 cl.4 invariant (circle endpoints, square wash, self-delimiting band, 4 WHCM states, ADR-0057 shape signifier) is named with how it survives; the ADR-0048 cell-size floor is preserved as the minmax minimum

nodes.label: ADR-0106 — ui-text overflow ruling (#32): a truncate prop + measured auto-title reveal + ui-tooltip pairing guidance, catalog Text row gains the prop
nodes.accept: adr_check.py 0106-*.md exits 0; the API is catalog-reachable (Text row named in Repairs); the stamp (as!=none) leg is covered; auto-minting a tooltip is a rejected alternative with the layering reason; the button label-wrapper anatomy is named as a deferred extension

nodes.label: #27 disposition — ui-text as=h* stamp gap: needs-live-diagnosis (no property identifiable from the ticket without the screenshot), routed to the post-ADR-0100 re-audit; the Text-catalog no-bold-emphasis gap named as follow-up intake
nodes.accept: the handback names #27 as needs-live-diagnosis with the candidate property list (text-transform, text-align, text-wrap, font-variant sublonghands) and the re-audit owner; no ADR minted

nodes.label: log bookkeeping: README index rows for 0102-0106, all Status: proposed, doc-reviewer flagged as ratifier gate
nodes.accept: grep finds one index row per new ADR in README.md; no ADR self-ratified (Status: proposed in all five); the handback names doc-reviewer

actions.label: answer the page-author-delegation principle ONCE, fleet-wide (when is a no-CSS default unsafe; which lane fixes it: safe component default / catalog prop / taught idiom)
radios render with usable rhythm on A2UI surfaces deterministically (no model uptake required)
radio-group's visual axis matches its shipped orientation semantics (today orientation moves only the roving axis; radios flow inline regardless)
form fields render with vertical rhythm on A2UI surfaces via a lane the consumer's grammar CAN express
tabs nested in any surface (Card elevation=1, the pattern-wizard seed) read as ONE surface — no second box
a consumer who wants a tabs plane can still ask for one from the catalog and from the page (elevation/brightness already catalog-reachable)
ui-calendar fills its given width (the booking-reservation stretched Column case)
range-band state visuals survive the width change (ADR-0093 cl.4: circular endpoints, square interior wash, self-delimiting band, four WHCM states, ADR-0057 shape signifier)
calendar shrink-wrapped minimum geometry is unchanged (ADR-0048 cell ramp stays the floor)
long display text can truncate to one line with an ellipsis, reachable from the catalog Text row
the truncated full text stays reachable (AT reads it for free; sighted-pointer reveal via measured auto-title; rich reveal via the Tooltip pairing idiom)
the #27 stamp gap is dispositioned honestly (needs-live-diagnosis, owner named) instead of guessed
every ruling is a checkable record: adr_check green, index row, Status proposed, generator!=ratifier preserved, doc-review flagged
every default change names who relies on the old default (measured blast radius) and repairs the lying docs in the same change

edges.why: the spacing ruling applies 0102's decision rule (wrap-impossible -> component-owned lane); the rule must exist to be cited
the form-provider leg applies 0102's taught-idiom lane and its severity test for accepting residual model-uptake risk
the tabs ruling applies 0102's law (a surface default that lies inside another surface is a no-CSS-verb defect; the catalog prop lane already exists)
the calendar ruling applies 0102's law (width adaptation must not require page CSS) while preserving named upstream invariants
the text ruling applies 0102's catalog-prop lane (a new prop reachable from the Text row)
index rows and status bookkeeping can only be written for records that exist; 0103 covers both legs
same record as n2a — the bookkeeping row lands once the pair ruling is authored
0104's index row needs the authored record
0105's index row needs the authored record
0106's index row needs the authored record
